creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
If converting do-* targets conditionals to option helpers requires quirks the documentation should explicitly say so. Other target helpers don't require special attention: pre-* and post-* mainly concatenate rules to an existing do-* target.


Besides, NO_FOO isn't always equivalent to an empty target:

  # Mk/bsd.port.mk
  .if defined(NO_BUILD) && !target(build)
  build: configure
          @${TOUCH} ${TOUCH_FLAGS} ${BUILD_COOKIE}
  .endif

which would make a port skip build if it has only do-build-${opt}-on/off.
